brand.name: Hoag Land Services
brand.tagline: Site, Tree & Fence Work in Central Florida
brand.voice: Direct, honest, capable. No fluff — straightforward tradespeople who do quality work outdoors.

logo.description: Circular badge with a bold X/cross motif. Letters H (left), L (top), S (right) arranged around the cross. A vintage tractor illustration sits in the lower center of the circle. Dark forest green on transparent background.

brand.name: Forest Green
brand.usage: Primary brand color — header background, primary buttons, links, accents

accent.name: Warm Bronze / Tan
accent.usage: Secondary accent — accent buttons, decorative card bars, highlights

typography.fontStack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", sans-serif
typography.type: System font stack (no custom web fonts)
typography.notes: No Google Fonts or custom typefaces — uses OS native sans-serif stack for performance and readability.

serviceCard.accentBar: ::before pseudo-element with gradient using brand/accent colors

lightbox.overlay: position: fixed, dark background, opacity transition

imagery.style: Real job-site photography — no stock photos. iPhone shots from actual projects.
subjects: Heavy equipment (excavators, tractors) in wooded Florida landscapes
Tree removal with cranes and bucket trucks in residential areas
Fence lines across open fields and pastures under blue skies
Florida native vegetation: palms, live oaks, cypress

site.description: Yellow SANY excavator doing land clearing in a wooded area; worker visible in background; overcast Florida sky

tree.description: Tree removal in progress — large tree being felled with crane/bucket truck in a residential neighborhood with palms and live oaks; bright blue sky

fence.description: Long wooden post-and-rail fence running along a cleared field with dry grass; truck parked along fence line; expansive blue sky

styleIdentity.aesthetic: Clean, functional, rugged-outdoors. Earthy greens and warm browns grounded in real Florida land-clearing work.
styleIdentity.mood: Trustworthy, capable, no-nonsense. Like the crew themselves.
designPrinciples: Simple and straight-forward — mirrors the company's own service language
Photography does the heavy lifting — real work, real results
Green-dominant brand tied to outdoor/environmental service identity
Warm bronze accent adds approachability and contrast
doNots: Avoid corporate polish — keep it authentic and grounded
